goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: approve_canary。T044は資格名・既知問題・正答を実装条件に持たず、sourceHashと機械検出offsetからboundary/candidate IDを決定する。review v2はIDと分類情報以外を拒否し、二者完全一致後だけserverがIDを順序・非重複・範囲・boundary IDまで再検証して原文sliceへ解決する。prompt v3で旧checkpointを再利用せず、batch予約・確定・consensusは単一load/write/readbackかつ同一lockで原子的に扱う。

worker_package.objective: 第一種衛生管理者のexact 2 questionIdsをfresh question_type parentでcanaryし、target候補と構造的non-target候補について二者ID-only review、prompt v3、tool-owned slice、checkpoint batch証拠をreadbackする。
verify: Preview and parent manifest contain exactly questionIds 5c0b87569ecfd60b3d195d5d and a5016be8b9bc9d2e459e1659, question_type only, no listGroupIds/range/resume.
Each question has exactly two resolved distinct-thread gpt-5.5/high prompt-v3 reviews and no third review.
Review payloads contain candidateId and no spans, body, summary, raw offsets, truth answer, or unsupported field.

The aggregate target, if exact-approved, resolves the server-generated candidate ID to exact source slices and reproducible derived keys; the structural premise candidate remains non_target or hold without decomposition publication.
No same-parent retry; disagreement, missing candidate, invalid review, source mismatch, or semantic ambiguity holds the question.
114 focused tests pass; 00_source immutability and no Firestore invocation are confirmed.
stop_if: Either canary question cannot be bound uniquely to its source record.
A third review, raw offset fallback, agent-authored extracted text, or prompt-v2 checkpoint reuse is attempted.
Provider failure occurs; preserve a partial receipt and do not resume the same parent.
00_source, Firestore, or a path outside allowed_files would change.
The target does not reach exact agreement; return to Judge without weakening the contract.

evidence: Commit 8a94099e92e9a248d1f8e8103c0cacd8d1793789 contains only eight approved qualification-common implementation, contract, and test files.

114 focused tests passed, including forbidden output fields, exact candidate-ID agreement, nested marker handling, deterministic boundary IDs, atomic batch failure, and one load/write/readback counts.
The 1044-question mechanical audit generated 58 candidate sets and 222 boundaries; every ID, ordering, range, and exact source slice was recomputed successfully.
00_source immutability passed for 5799 files and no Firestore action was invoked.
blocked_tasks: Downstream correctness, explanation, question set, publish gate, and Firestore publication
missing_evidence: Fresh 1044-question rerun under the approved contract
required_board_updates: Activate T046 canary Worker; keep full rerun and downstream blocked.
